content.content:
Done — I scheduled the one-hour "Follow-up Meeting" on 2024-05-19 from 11:30 to 12:30 with the description: "Follow-up to discuss project progress and action items." It includes your calendar as a participant.

Notes:
- I couldn't schedule at 10:00 because you already have "Project Kick-off" at 10:00–11:00 and a one-on-one at 11:00–11:30 that day, so I booked the soonest available one-hour slot starting at 11:30.
- If you'd prefer a different time or want me to invite specific participants, tell me who to invite or which time to try next.
